dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent, so both LONG and SHORT entry/exit conditions provided. Price sequence setup translated as N=2 consecutive bars of directional closes validated against sma_20. Directional confirmation uses close > sma_20 (20-period MA as specified). Volume confirmation uses volume > sma_10 (10-day MA period). Directional move of 1.0% represented as returns threshold. Stop loss set to 1.5% as specified. Take profit ratio set to 2.5x as specified. Regime targets expanded to include both trending directions plus ranging per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal is context-dependent, so both LONG and SHORT entry/exit conditions provided. Price sequence setup translated as N=2 consecutive bars of directional closes validated against sma_20. Directional confirmation uses close > sma_20 (20-period MA as specified). Volume confirmation uses volume > sma_10 (10-day MA period). Directional move of 1.0% represented as returns threshold. Stop loss set to 1.5% as specified. Take profit ratio set to 2.5x as specified. Regime targets expanded to include both trending directions plus ranging per signal specification.

source_rule_text: Combine price sequence setups with directional price confirmation signals to increase setup reliability beyond simple price data alone.
